description: Ceylon Liquor Holdings (Pvt) Ltd Vs. Commissioner General of Excise and Others Ceylon Liquor Holdings (Pvt) Ltd Vs. Commissioner General of Excise and Others View More before Dr. Hon. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Ceylon Liquor Holdings (Pvt) Ltd Vs. Commissioner General of Excise and Others Ceylon Liquor Holdings (Pvt) Ltd Vs. Commissioner General of Excise and Others View More
judgement_by: Dr. Hon. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner had made an application to obtain a FL-04 liquor license under the Excise Ordinance by submitting the relevant documents along with the application. The Commissioner, having accepted the same, has not taken further steps to issue the same. Held – Writ issued.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
